column1: # sheet.fn.info.sheet golden corpus (spec §7, §11; Microsoft SHEET docs).
# SHEET([value]) is the 1-based sheet index of a reference; with no argument it
# is the sheet of the cell being evaluated (EvalCtx.current.sheet + 1); with a
# RANGE argument it is the sheet of the reference's top-left (origin + 1). A
# lone A1 token in the family decoder resolves to a scalar VALUE (not a range),
# so a range needs explicit A1:B2 syntax to keep the reference recoverable.
# These goldens are replayed on a single-sheet engine/decoder whose current cell
# and every range origin live on sheet 0, so each case is 1. T1 LIMITATION: a
# sheet-NAME text argument is unsupported (a scalar arg falls back to the current
# cell's sheet), so the scalar cases below also resolve to the current sheet (1).
